2165960.name: Fantasy Grounds - Mutant Crawl Classics #4: Warlords of ATOZ
2165960.description:
Mutant Crawl Classics #4: Warlords of ATOZ

A Level 3 Adventure for MCC RPG
When your hothouse jungle home is suddenly flooded with dispossessed refugees, they all tell the same tale. A conquering horde of warlords wielding magic boom sticks are wiping out whole villages and enslaving the inhabitants -- all in the name of a surviving Ancient One they worship as a god. The tribal elders send you and your Seeker team out to investigate, and if possible infiltrate, the temple of the great and powerful ATOZ.
Rules Set: MCC RPG (also compatible with DCC RPG)
Written by: Jim Wampler Cover Art: Peter Mullen
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: S.Yanoska
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Mutant Crawl Classics ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
